newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Legrand's data-center M&A (Keydak/China, TES/UK), the FY26 10-15% sales-growth and high-end data-center growth guidance, and the strong Q1 (+18% reported, +9.3% organic) were all March-April events already in the prior case. The +6.2% move since June 9 is sector/momentum, not new fundamentals.

sources.label: Legrand acquires TES for DC growth

verdicts.rankRationale: No new evidence since June 9; data-center M&A and FY26 guide were Q1 news already chased. The +6.2% pop is momentum, not fresh thesis change. A $46B well-covered name sits correctly in the secondary residual bucket, farther from the scarcest passive/power chokepoints.
verdicts.bull: Busway/PDU and data-center electrical exposure compounding via bolt-on M&A; data-center growth guided to high end.
verdicts.neutral: Real AI-adjacent demand, but well-covered $46B cap with limited hidden alpha vs purer bottleneck names.
verdicts.bear: Rerating leaves little residual alpha; broad electrical cyclicality and FX drag.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Data-center order intake / further bolt-on M&A.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Valuation rerating already discounts AI-electrical demand.

verdicts.rankRationale: Power & Grid latent-node fit unchanged. No fresh catalyst since June 9; the data-center acquisition cadence and Q1 print are already public. Market increasingly recognizes this exposure (the thesis caveat), so no re-rank on the latent screen.
verdicts.bull: Racks, PDU and building electrification tie directly to power & grid bottleneck.
verdicts.neutral: Quality DC exposure but no longer under-covered.
verdicts.bear: Recognition reduces latent-alpha; large, liquid, widely followed.

verdicts.rankRationale: Master under-owned-bottleneck list: power/cooling/electrical bucket. Audit already balanced electrical-distribution bottleneck vs. rerating. No regulated news since June 9; nothing to re-rank intra-bucket. Hold rank 4.
verdicts.bull: Scarce DC electrical-infrastructure bottleneck exposure with M&A optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Solid bottleneck name, fairly valued after rerating.
verdicts.bear: Less scarce than transformer/switchgear pure-plays; mega-cap recognition.
